phrases.text_local: Olá, onde estão os remédios naturais?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH reh-MEH-deeoosh nuh-too-REYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese pharmacies, natural remedies are often in a dedicated shelf section; pointing is common.

likely_response.local: Na secção de prateleiras, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH SEH-sown DIH pruh-tih-LAY-ruhsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the shelf section, on the left.

responses.english: In the shelf section, on the left.
responses.phonetic: NUH SEH-sown DIH pruh-tih-LAY-ruhsh, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.french: Na secção de prateleiras, à esquerda.
